requirements.full_sentence:
must be
benchmarked to best practices.
requirements.object: practices

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs
may have already implemented or may be implementing some of the requirements indicated in the circular.
requirements.object: may be implementing some of the requirements indicated in the circular

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs may place these directions before their Board, together with a gap-analysis vis-a-vis the Master
Direction and the proposed action by September 30, 2017.
requirements.object: their Board, together with a gap-analysis vis-a-vis the Master Direction and the proposed action by September 30, 2017

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs- Systemically Important shall comply with the Master Directions by June 30, 2018 and other
NBFCs (asset size below ` 500 crore) shall comply by September 30, 2018.
requirements.object: Directions by June 30, 2018 and other NBFCs (asset size below ` 500 crore) shall comply by September 30, 2018

requirements.full_sentence:
The basic principles of value delivery, IT Risk Management, IT resource management and performance
management must form the basis of governance framework.
requirements.object: governance framework

requirements.full_sentence:
Given the criticality of the IT, NBFCs may follow relevant aspects of such prudential governance standards
that have found acceptability in the finance industry.
requirements.object: such prudential governance standards that have found acceptability in the finance industry

requirements.full_sentence: 1.1 IT Strategy Committee: NBFCs are required to form an IT Strategy Committee.
requirements.object: Strategy Committee

requirements.full_sentence:
The chairman of the
committee shall be an independent director and CIO & CTO should be a part of the committee.
requirements.object: and CIO & CTO should be a part of the committee

requirements.full_sentence:
The IT
Strategy Committee should meet at an appropriate frequency but not more than six months should elapse
between two meetings.
requirements.object: frequency but not more than six months should elapse between two meetings

requirements.full_sentence:
The Committee shall work in partnership with other Board committees and Senior
Management to provide input to them.
requirements.object: other Board committees and Senior Management to provide input to them

requirements.full_sentence: Its deliberations may be placed before the Board.
requirements.object: Board

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs may formulate a Board approved IT policy, in line with the objectives of their organisation
comprising the following:
a) An IT organizational structure commensurate with the size, scale and nature of business activities
carried out by the NBFC;
requirements.object: IT policy, in line with the objectives of their organisation comprising the following: a) An IT organizational structure co

requirements.full_sentence:
b) NBFCs may designate a senior executive as the Chief Information Officer (CIO) or in-Charge of IT
operations whose responsibility is to ensure implementation of IT Policy to the operational level
involving IT strategy, value delivery, risk management and IT resource management.
requirements.object: as the Chief Information Officer (CIO) or in-Charge of IT operations whose responsibility is to ensure implementation of

requirements.full_sentence:
c) To ensure technical competence at senior/middle level management of NBFC, periodic assessment
of the IT training requirements should be formulated to ensure that sufficient, competent and capable
human resources are available.
requirements.object: that sufficient, competent and capable human resources are available

requirements.full_sentence:
d) The NBFCs which are currently not using IPv6 platform should migrate to the same as per National
Telecom Policy issued by the Government of India in 2012.
requirements.object: as per National Telecom Policy issued by the Government of India in 2012

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs must have a board approved IS Policy with the following basic tenets:
a) Confidentiality - Ensuring access to sensitive data to authorized users only.
requirements.object: IS Policy with the following basic tenets: a) Confidentiality - Ensuring access to sensitive data to authorized users only

requirements.full_sentence:
3.1 The IS Policy must provide for a IS framework with the following basic tenets:
a) Identification and Classification of Information Assets.
requirements.object: framework with the following basic tenets: a) Identification and Classification of Information Assets

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs shall maintain detailed inventory
of Information Asset with distinct and clear identification of the asset.
requirements.object: Information Asset with distinct and clear identification of the asset

requirements.full_sentence:
b) Segregation of functions: There should be segregation of the duties of the Security Officer/Group
(both physical security as well as cyber security) dealing exclusively with information systems
security and the Information Technology division which actually implements the computer systems.
requirements.object: duties of the Security Officer/Group (both physical security as well as cyber security) dealing exclusively with information sys

requirements.full_sentence:
The information security function should be adequately resourced in terms of the number of staff,
level of skill and tools or techniques like risk assessment, security architecture, vulnerability
assessment, forensic assessment, etc.
requirements.object: terms of the number of staff, level of skill and tools or techniques like risk assessment, security architecture, vulnerabi

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, there should be a clear segregation of
responsibilities relating to system administration, database administration and transaction
processing.
requirements.object: of responsibilities relating to system administration, database administration and transaction processing

requirements.full_sentence:
c) Role based Access Control - Access to information should be based on well-defined user roles
(system administrator, user manager, application owner etc.), NBFCs shall avoid dependence on
one or few persons for a particular job.
requirements.object: or few persons for a particular job

requirements.full_sentence:
There should be clear delegation of authority for right to
upgrade/change user profiles and permissions and also key business parameters (eg.
requirements.object: authority for right to upgrade/change user profiles and permissions and also key business parameters (eg

requirements.full_sentence:
interest rates)
which should be documented.

d) Personnel Security - A few authorized application owners/users may have intimate knowledge of
financial institution processes and they pose potential threat to systems and data.
requirements.object: financial institution processes and they pose potential threat to systems and data

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFC should have
a process of appropriate check and balance in this regard.
requirements.object: appropriate check and balance in this regard

requirements.full_sentence:
Personnel with privileged access like
system administrator, cyber security personnel, etc should be subject to rigorous background check
and screening.
requirements.object: background check and screening

requirements.full_sentence:
For each transaction, there must be at least two individuals necessary for its
completion as this will reduce the risk of error and will ensure reliability of information.
requirements.object: individuals necessary for its completion as this will reduce the risk of error and will ensure reliability of information

requirements.full_sentence: g) Incident Management - The IS Policy should define what constitutes an incident.
requirements.object: incident

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs shall
develop and implement processes for preventing, detecting, analysing and responding to information
security incidents.
requirements.object: for preventing, detecting, analysing and responding to information security incidents

requirements.full_sentence:
h) Trails- NBFCs shall ensure that audit trails exist for IT assets satisfying its business requirements
including regulatory and legal requirements, facilitating audit, serving as forensic evidence when
required and assisting in dispute resolution.
requirements.object: exist for IT assets satisfying its business requirements including regulatory and legal requirements, facilitating audit, ser

requirements.full_sentence:
If an employee, for instance, attempts to access an
unauthorized section, this improper activity should be recorded in the audit trail.
requirements.object: audit trail

requirements.full_sentence:
Page 6 of 15
i) Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) - NBFCs may increase the usage of PKI to ensure confidentiality of
data, access control, data integrity, authentication and nonrepudiation.
requirements.object: PKI to ensure confidentiality of data, access control, data integrity, authentication and nonrepudiation

requirements.full_sentence:
3.2 Cyber Security
Need for a Board approved Cyber-security Policy
NBFCs should put in place a cyber-security policy elucidating the strategy containing an appropriate
approach to combat cyber threats given the level of complexity of business and acceptable levels of risk,
duly approved by their Board.
requirements.object: cyber-security policy elucidating the strategy containing an appropriate approach to combat cyber threats given the level of complexity

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs should review the organisational arrangements so that the security
concerns are appreciated, receive adequate attention and get escalated to appropriate levels in the
hierarchy to enable quick action.
requirements.object: so that the security concerns are appreciated, receive adequate attention and get escalated to appropriate leve

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs may devise a strategy for managing and eliminating vulnerabilities and such strategy may clearly be
communicated in the Cyber Security policy.
requirements.object: managing and eliminating vulnerabilities and such strategy may clearly be communicated in the Cyber Security policy

requirements.full_sentence:
3.4 Cyber security preparedness indicators
The adequacy of and adherence to cyber resilience framework should be assessed and measured through
development of indicators to assess the level of risk/preparedness.
requirements.object: through development of indicators to assess the level of risk/preparedness

requirements.full_sentence:
These indicators should be used for
comprehensive testing through independent compliance checks and audits carried out by qualified and
competent professionals.
requirements.object: testing through independent compliance checks and audits carried out by qualified and competent professionals

requirements.full_sentence:
The awareness among the stakeholders including employees may also form a part
of this assessment.
requirements.object: of this assessment

requirements.full_sentence:
3.5 Cyber Crisis Management Plan
A Cyber Crisis Management Plan (CCMP) should be immediately evolved and should be a part of the
overall Board approved strategy.
requirements.object: should be a part of the overall Board approved strategy

requirements.full_sentence:
CCMP should address the following four aspects: (i) Detection (ii)
Response (iii) Recovery and (iv) Containment.
requirements.object: aspects: (i) Detection (ii) Response (iii) Recovery and (iv) Containment

requirements.full_sentence:
Among other things, NBFCs should take necessary preventive and corrective
measures in addressing various types of cyber threats including, but not limited to, denial of service,
distributed denial of services (DDoS), ransom-ware / crypto ware, destructive malware, business email
Page 7 of 15
frauds including spam, email phishing, spear phishing, whaling, vishing frauds, drive-by downloads, browser
gateway fraud, ghost administrator exploits, identity frauds, memory update frauds, password related frauds,
etc.
requirements.object: corrective measures in addressing various types of cyber threats including, but not limited to, denial of service, distr

requirements.full_sentence:
3.6 Sharing of information on cyber-security incidents with RBI
NBFCs are required to report all types of unusual security incidents as specified in point No.
requirements.object: of unusual security incidents as specified in point No

requirements.full_sentence:
3.7 Cyber-security awareness among stakeholders / Top Management / Board
It should be realized that managing cyber risk requires the commitment of the entire organization to create a
cyber-safe environment.
requirements.object: cyber risk requires the commitment of the entire organization to create a cyber-safe environment

requirements.full_sentence:
Top
Management and Board should also have a fair degree of awareness of the fine nuances of the threats and
appropriate familiarisation may be organized.

NBFCs should proactively promote, among their customers,
vendors, service providers and other relevant stakeholders an understanding of their cyber resilience
objectives, and require and ensure appropriate action to support their synchronised implementation and
testing.
requirements.object: customers, vendors, service providers and other relevant stakeholders an understanding of their cyber resilience obje

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs may consider use of Digital signatures to protect the authenticity and integrity
of important electronic documents and also for high value fund transfer.
requirements.object: signatures to protect the authenticity and integrity of important electronic documents and also for high value fund transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
3.9 IT Risk Assessment
NBFCs should undertake a comprehensive risk assessment of their IT systems at least on a yearly basis.
requirements.object: assessment of their IT systems at least on a yearly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The assessment should make an analysis on the threats and vulnerabilities to the information technology
assets of the NBFC and its existing security controls and processes.
requirements.object: the threats and vulnerabilities to the information technology assets of the NBFC and its existing security controls and processes

requirements.full_sentence:
The outcome of the exercise should be
to find out the risks present and to determine the appropriate level of controls necessary for appropriate
mitigation of risks.
requirements.object: the risks present and to determine the appropriate level of controls necessary for appropriate mitigation of risks

requirements.full_sentence:
The risk assessment should be brought to the notice of the Chief Risk Officer (CRO), CIO
and the Board of the NBFC and should serve as an input for Information Security auditors.
requirements.object: notice of the Chief Risk Officer (CRO), CIO and the Board of the NBFC and should serve as an input for Information Security auditors

requirements.full_sentence:
3.10 Mobile Financial Services
NBFCs that are already using or intending to use Mobile Financial Services should develop a mechanism for
safeguarding information assets that are used by mobile applications to provide services to customers.
requirements.object: safeguarding information assets that are used by mobile applications to provide services to customers

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Page 8 of 15
technology used for mobile services should ensure confidentiality, integrity, authenticity and must provide for
end-to end encryption.
requirements.object: and must provide for end-to end encryption

requirements.full_sentence:
3.11 Social Media Risks
NBFCs using Social Media to market their products should be well equipped in handling social media risks
and threats.
requirements.object: handling social media risks and threats

requirements.full_sentence:
As Social Media is vulnerable to account takeovers and malware distribution, proper controls,
such as encryption and secure connections, should be prevalent to mitigate such risks.
requirements.object: such risks

requirements.full_sentence:
The programme may be periodically
updated keeping in view changes in information technology system, threats/vulnerabilities and/or the
information security framework.
requirements.object: in view changes in information technology system, threats/vulnerabilities and/or the information security framework

requirements.full_sentence:
IT OPERATIONS
4 IT Operations should support processing and storage of information, such that the required information is
available in a timely, reliable, secure and resilient manner.
requirements.object: of information, such that the required information is available in a timely, reliable, secure and resilient manner

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board or Senior Management should take
into consideration the risk associated with existing and planned IT operations and the risk tolerance and
then establish and monitor policies for risk management.
requirements.object: risk associated with existing and planned IT operations and the risk tolerance and then establish and monitor policies for

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs should identify system deficiencies and
defects at the system design, development and testing phases.
requirements.object: defects at the system design, development and testing phases

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs should establish a steering committee, consisting of business owners, the development team and
other stakeholders to provide oversight and monitoring of the progress of the project, including deliverables
to be realized at each phase of the project and milestones to be reached according to the project timetable.
requirements.object: consisting of business owners, the development team and other stakeholders to provide oversight and monitoring of the

requirements.full_sentence:
4.2 NBFCs are required to realign their IT systems on a regular basis in line with the changing needs of its
customers and business.
requirements.object: systems on a regular basis in line with the changing needs of its customers and business

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, NBFCs should
develop, with the approval of their Board, a Change Management Policy that encompasses the following:
a) prioritizing and responding to change proposals from business,
b) cost benefit analysis of the changes proposed,
c) assessing risks associated with the changes proposed,
d) change implementation, monitoring and reporting.
requirements.object: of their Board, a Change Management Policy that encompasses the following: a) prioritizing and responding to change proposa

requirements.full_sentence:
It should be the responsibility of the senior management to ensure that the Change Management policy is
being followed on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: the senior management to ensure that the Change Management policy is being followed on an ongoing basis

requirements.full_sentence:
4.3 IT Enabled Management Information System
The IT function of an NBFC should support a robust and comprehensive Management Information System
(MIS) in respect of various business functions as per the needs of the business.
requirements.object: comprehensive Management Information System (MIS) in respect of various business functions as per the needs of the business

requirements.full_sentence:
A good MIS should take
care of information needs at all levels in the business including top management.
requirements.object: needs at all levels in the business including top management

requirements.full_sentence:
4.4 NBFCs may put in place MIS that assist the Top Management as well as the business heads in decision
making and also to maintain an oversight over operations of various business verticals.
requirements.object: that assist the Top Management as well as the business heads in decision making and also to maintain an oversight over operations of

requirements.full_sentence:
With robust IT
systems in place, NBFCs may have the following as part of an effective system generated MIS (indicative
list)
a) A dashboard for the Top Management summarising financial position vis-à-vis targets.
requirements.object: part of an effective system generated MIS (indicative list) a) A dashboard for the Top Management summarising financial position

requirements.full_sentence:
It may include
information on trend on returns on assets across categories, major growth business segments,
movement of net-worth etc.
requirements.object: on returns on assets across categories, major growth business segments, movement of net-worth etc

requirements.full_sentence: c) The MIS should facilitate pricing of products, especially large ticket loans.
requirements.object: especially large ticket loans

requirements.full_sentence: d) The MIS should capture regulatory requirements and their compliance.
requirements.object: their compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
The regulatory
requirement of reporting fraud to RBI should be system driven.

4.5 MIS for Supervisory requirements - The MIS that help management in taking strategic decisions
shall also assist in generating the required information/returns for the supervisor.
requirements.object: the required information/returns for the supervisor

requirements.full_sentence:
All
regulatory/supervisory returns should be system driven;

there should be seamless integration between
MIS system of the NBFC and reporting under COSMOS.
requirements.object: MIS system of the NBFC and reporting under COSMOS

requirements.full_sentence:
IS Audit shall identify
risks and methods to mitigate risk arising out of IT infrastructure such as server architecture, local and wide
area networks, physical and information security, telecommunications etc.
requirements.object: to mitigate risk arising out of IT infrastructure such as server architecture, local and wide area networks, physical and i

requirements.full_sentence: 5.1 IS Audit should form an integral part of Internal Audit system of the NBFC.
requirements.object: of Internal Audit system of the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
While designing the IS
framework, NBFCs shall refer to guidance issued by Professional bodies like ISACA, IIA, ICAI in this regard.
requirements.object: by Professional bodies like ISACA, IIA, ICAI in this regard

requirements.full_sentence: NBFCs shall adopt an IS Audit framework duly approved by their Board.
requirements.object: framework duly approved by their Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, NBFCs shall have adequately skilled personnel in Audit Committee who can understand the results
of the IS Audit.
requirements.object: in Audit Committee who can understand the results of the IS Audit

requirements.full_sentence:
5.2 Coverage: IS Audit should cover effectiveness of policy and oversight of IT systems, evaluating
adequacy of processes and internal controls, recommend corrective action to address deficiencies and
follow-up.
requirements.object: and oversight of IT systems, evaluating adequacy of processes and internal controls, recommend corrective action to addr

requirements.full_sentence:
IS Audit should also evaluate the effectiveness of business continuity planning, disaster recovery
set up and ensure that BCP is effectively implemented in the organization.
requirements.object: of business continuity planning, disaster recovery set up and ensure that BCP is effectively implemented in the organi

requirements.full_sentence:
During the process of IS Audit,
due importance shall be given to compliance of all the applicable legal and statutory requirements.
requirements.object: of all the applicable legal and statutory requirements

requirements.full_sentence: 5.3 Personnel - IS Audit may be conducted by an internal team of the NBFC.
requirements.object: internal team of the NBFC

conditions:
In case of inadequate internal
skills
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of inadequate internal
skills, NBFCs may appoint an outside agency having enough expertise in area of IT/IS audit for the purpose.
requirements.object: having enough expertise in area of IT/IS audit for the purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
There should be a right mix of skills and understanding of legal and regulatory requirements so as to
assess the efficacy of the framework vis-à-vis these standards.
requirements.object: of skills and understanding of legal and regulatory requirements so as to assess the efficacy of the framework vis-à-vis these standard

requirements.full_sentence:
IS Auditors should act independently of
NBFCs' Management both in attitude and appearance.
requirements.object: Management both in attitude and appearance

conditions:
In case of engagement of external professional
service providers
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of engagement of external professional
service providers, independence and accountability issues may be properly addressed.

5.4 Periodicity - The periodicity of IS audit should ideally be based on the size and operations of the NBFC
but may be conducted at least once in a year.
requirements.object: once in a year

requirements.full_sentence:
IS Audit should be undertaken preferably prior to the statutory
Page 11 of 15
audit so that IS audit reports are available to the statutory auditors well in time for examination and for
incorporating comments, if any, in the audit reports.
requirements.object: to the statutory Page 11 of 15 audit so that IS audit reports are available to the statutory auditors well in time for examination and for incorporating comments

requirements.full_sentence:
5.5 Reporting - The framework should clearly prescribe the reporting framework, whether to the Board or
a Committee of the Board viz.
requirements.object: framework, whether to the Board or a Committee of the Board viz

requirements.full_sentence:
Responsibilities for
compliance/sustenance of compliance, reporting lines, timelines for submission of compliance, authority for
accepting compliance should be clearly delineated in the framework.
requirements.object: the framework

requirements.full_sentence:
The framework may provide for an
audit-mode access for auditors/ inspecting/ regulatory authorities.
requirements.object: access for auditors/ inspecting/ regulatory authorities

requirements.full_sentence:
5.7 Computer-Assisted Audit Techniques (CAATs): NBFCs shall adopt a proper mix of manual
techniques and CAATs for conducting IS Audit.
requirements.object: of manual techniques and CAATs for conducting IS Audit

requirements.full_sentence:
CAATs may be used in critical areas (such as detection of
revenue leakage, treasury functions, assessing impact of control weaknesses, monitoring customer
transactions under AML requirements and generally in areas where a large volume of transactions are
reported) particularly for critical functions or processes having financial/regulatory/legal implications.
requirements.object: areas (such as detection of revenue leakage, treasury functions, assessing impact of control weaknesses, monitoring customer trans

requirements.full_sentence:
BCP shall be designed to minimise the operational, financial, legal, reputational and
other material consequences arising from a disaster.
requirements.object: the operational, financial, legal, reputational and other material consequences arising from a disaster

requirements.full_sentence: NBFC should adopt a Board approved BCP Policy.
requirements.object: BCP Policy

requirements.full_sentence: The functioning of BCP shall be monitored by the Board by way of periodic reports.
requirements.object: Board by way of periodic reports

requirements.full_sentence:
The CIO shall be
responsible for formulation, review and monitoring of BCP to ensure continued effectiveness.
requirements.object: review and monitoring of BCP to ensure continued effectiveness

requirements.full_sentence:
The BCP may
have the following salient features:
requirements.object: features:

requirements.full_sentence:
6.1 Business Impact Analysis- NBFCs shall first identify critical business verticals, locations and shared
resources to come up with the detailed Business Impact Analysis.
requirements.object: verticals, locations and shared resources to come up with the detailed Business Impact Analysis

requirements.full_sentence:
The entity shall clearly list the
business impact areas in order of priority.
requirements.object: impact areas in order of priority

requirements.full_sentence:
6.2 Recovery strategy/ Contingency Plan- NBFCs shall try to fully understand the vulnerabilities
associated with interrelationships between various systems, departments and business processes.
requirements.object: the vulnerabilities associated with interrelationships between various systems, departments and business processes

requirements.full_sentence:
The BCP
Page 12 of 15
should come up with the probabilities of various failure scenarios.
requirements.object: probabilities of various failure scenarios

requirements.full_sentence:
Evaluation of various options should be
done for recovery and the most cost-effective, practical strategy should be selected to minimize losses in
case of a disaster.
requirements.object: and the most cost-effective, practical strategy should be selected to minimize losses in case of a disaster

requirements.full_sentence:
6.3 NBFCs shall consider the need to put in place necessary backup sites for their critical business systems
and Data centers.
requirements.object: put in place necessary backup sites for their critical business systems and Data centers

requirements.full_sentence:
6.4 NBFCs shall test the BCP either annually or when significant IT or business changes take place to
determine if the entity could be recovered to an acceptable level of business within the timeframe stated in
the contingency plan.
requirements.object: annually or when significant IT or business changes take place to determine if the entity could be recovered to an acceptable leve

requirements.full_sentence: The test should be based on 'worst case scenarios'.
requirements.object: case scenarios'

requirements.full_sentence:
The results along with the gap
analysis may be placed before the CIO and the Board.
requirements.object: CIO and the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
The GAP Analysis along with Board's insight should
form the basis for construction of the updated BCP.
requirements.object: construction of the updated BCP

requirements.full_sentence:
However, prior to commencement of any outsourcing arrangement, careful
consideration of risks, threats of contractual arrangements and regulatory compliance obligations must take
place.

The NBFC's decision to
outsource IT Services should fit into the institution's overall strategic plan and corporate objectives.
requirements.object: overall strategic plan and corporate objectives

requirements.full_sentence:
7.1 The terms and conditions governing the contract between the NBFC and the Outsourcing service
provider should be carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by NBFC's legal counsel on their legal
effect and enforceability.
requirements.object: written agreements and vetted by NBFC's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability

requirements.full_sentence: The contractual agreement may have the following provisions.

Outsourcing
service provider should have adequate systems and procedures in place to ensure protection of
data/application outsourced.
requirements.object: procedures in place to ensure protection of data/application outsourced

requirements.full_sentence:
For technology outsourcing, requisite
audit trails and logs for administrative activities should be retained and accessible to the NBFC
based on approved requests.
requirements.object: to the NBFC based on approved requests

requirements.full_sentence:
The contractual agreement may include clauses to allow the Reserve Bank of India or persons
authorized by it to access the NBFC's documents, records of transactions, and other
necessary information given to, stored or processed by the service provider within a reasonable
time.
requirements.object: the Reserve Bank of India or persons authorized by it to access the NBFC's documents, records of transactions, and other nece

requirements.full_sentence:
7.3 The Role of IT Strategy committee in respect of outsourced operations shall include
a) Instituting an appropriate governance mechanism for outsourced processes, comprising of risk
based policies and procedures, to effectively identify, measure, monitor and control risks associated
with outsourcing in an end to end manner;
requirements.object: appropriate governance mechanism for outsourced processes, comprising of risk based policies and procedures, to effectively

requirements.full_sentence:
j) NBFC should ensure that their business continuity preparedness is not adversely compromised on
account of outsourcing.
requirements.object: continuity preparedness is not adversely compromised on account of outsourcing

requirements.full_sentence:
It is recommended that smaller NBFCs may start with developing basic IT systems mainly for
maintaining the database.
requirements.object: IT systems mainly for maintaining the database

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs having asset size below ` 500 crore shall have a Board approved
Information Technology policy/Information system policy.
requirements.object: Information Technology policy/Information system policy

requirements.full_sentence:
This policy may be designed considering the
undermentioned basic standards and the same shall be put in place by September 30, 2018.
requirements.object: by September 30, 2018

requirements.full_sentence:
8.1 IT Systems should be progressively scaled up as the size and complexity of NBFC's operations
increases.
requirements.object: as the size and complexity of NBFC's operations increases

requirements.full_sentence:
Annex]
Note: All fields are REQUIRED to be filled unless otherwise stated.
requirements.object: otherwise stated

requirements.full_sentence:
Details should minimally include:

-Location, purpose of this system/ network, affected applications (including hardware manufacturer, software developer, make/ model, etc.) running on the systems/networks, etc.
requirements.object: of this system/ network, affected applications (including hardware manufacturer, software developer, make/ mode
